# Active Work List

## Product-Scope Item (Triggers isolation:work-list-no-product-entries)

- GTKB-ISOLATION-017: adopter-packaging program work item that should not appear in an adopter-subject backlog. Slice 4 classifies the failing check as needs-adopter-input — the adopter must clear product-scope entries from their work list manually before re-running ``gt project upgrade``.
